category.description: The kind of issue: 'apiview' for an APIView UI/service problem; 'avc' for an APIView Copilot (AI reviewer) problem; 'parser' for a language-specific APIView parser problem.

language.description: Programming language affected. Required when category is 'parser' (e.g. 'python', 'C#'); null when category is 'apiview' or 'avc'.

title.description: A concise GitHub issue title in sentence case, up to ~14 words, no trailing punctuation. Do NOT include any prefix such as [APIView], [AVC], or [Python APIView]; the server prepends one based on category and language.

body.description: The full GitHub issue body in Markdown, with the sections specified in the system prompt (Summary / Context / Details / Suggested Next Steps), ending with '---\n*Reported via APIView*'.
